name: NormalLineType
summary: The NormalLineType class defines the non-custom line types that can be used by the drawing objects.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Returns true if the current object and the given object are equal.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The object we wish to check the equality with.

returns.doc: True if the given object equals the current object.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns a hash code for the object.

returns.doc: The hash code for the object.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the LineTypes information as a string.

returns.doc: The LineTypes information as a string.
